name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Windows 10, Ubuntu 20.04, macOS 12]
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.11.0]
- Docker Version: [if applicable, e.g., 20.10.0]
- Docker Compose Version: [if applicable, e.g., 2.0.0]

## Error Message
If applicable, paste the full error traceback:
```
[error message here]
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (logs, configuration, etc.).

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked the [README](../README.md)
- [ ] I have checked the [ARCHITECTURE.md](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] I have searched for similar issues
- [ ] I am using the latest version of the code
